get_account_url.value: GET, requires Authorization Bearer Firebase idToken; response includes is_guest, subscription, balance, preferences

get_sessions_url.value: GET /api-gateway/api/v2/chats, requires Authorization Bearer Firebase idToken

login_by_guest_url.value: POST /v2/api/auth/session was called with empty JSON body in capture; likely sets server session/cookies tied to Firebase auth

token_location: Firebase Identity Toolkit idToken; used as Authorization: Bearer on https://prod.girlfriend.ai/api-gateway/api/v2/* and as ws query param token on wss://prod.girlfriend.ai/ws
notes: ['Concrete evidence shows Firebase anonymous signup (accounts:signUp) returning idToken/refreshToken/localId, then POST https://girlfriend.ai/v2/api/auth/session (200) and subsequent authorized API calls to https://prod.girlfriend.ai/api-gateway/api/v2/profile, /chats, /billing/* with Authorization: Bearer <idToken>.', 'WebSocket connection observed: wss://prod.girlfriend.ai/ws?token=<idToken>. No frames captured, so message send/stream endpoints and WS frame protocol cannot be inferred.', 'Remix/React-Router data fetch observed: GET https://girlfriend.ai/chat.data?_routes=routes%2Fchat%2Fchat returning redirect payload; not part of chat messaging API.']
